chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-989 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.3826/2022 2. For orders on office objection(s) 3. For orders on M.A No.3827/2022 4. For hearing of main case 29.03.2022 Mr. Mengal Meghwar, advocate for petitioner *** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. This petition seeks confirmation of his part time appointment as Peon. Petitioner claimed to have been appointed in the year 2006 by the Regional Directorate Colleges, Hyderabad as a part time Peon @ Rs.15,00/- per month without any codal formalities. There was no transparent mechanism engaged at the time of his appointment as Peon on part time basis, hence as of now he cannot seek his permanence. This would be a premium for a wrongful act if granted. There has to be a transparent mechanism even for the appointment of Peon, hence petitioner cannot be given a licence for a wrongful act that was performed in the year 2006. He has not performed equity, hence cannot claim equity. Accordingly petitioner is not entitled for any relief since he himself was appointed as a blue eyed person. This petition is dismissed accordingly alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
